General.Name: New China Life Insurance
General.Description: New China Life Insurance Company Ltd. provides life insurance products and services to individuals and institutions in China. The company operates through three segments: Traditional insurance, Participating insurance, and Other Business. It provides life insurance, health insurance, and accident insurance products and services. The company also offers asset management, investment management, training, electronic commerce, and medical services; and invests in, develops, leases, and manages real estate properties. The company was incorporated in 1996 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.
General.Address: New China Insurance Tower, Beijing, China, 100022
